metrics.name: stackra.branch.created.total
metrics.description: New Branches provisioned. `country_code` bucketed to the Branch's address.country_code.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.closed.total
metrics.description: reason_kind: relocation / consolidation / lease-ended / underperformance / other. Free-form reason text is NOT a label.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.status.total
metrics.description: Every status transition. Feeds the lifecycle dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.active.count
metrics.description: Point-in-time count per status. Populated hourly by the metrics-snapshot task.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.geocode.total
metrics.description: outcome: success / low_quality / failed / rate_limited / unavailable.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.geocode.duration_ms
metrics.description: Subprocessor call latency. P95 target < 3s (nominatim policy allows up to 10s).

metrics.name: stackra.branch.geocode.confidence
metrics.description: Distribution of provider-reported confidence scores. Low tail signals input-quality issues (vague addresses).

metrics.name: stackra.branch.reconcile.corrections
metrics.description: Number of default-branch invariant corrections applied per reconcile run. correction_kind: no_default_promoted / multi_default_demoted. Sustained non-zero indicates the observer + partial unique index are being bypassed (concerning).

metrics.name: stackra.branch.default_branch_resolve.duration_ms
metrics.description: `DefaultBranchResolver` resolution latency. Should be dominated by the Redis cache hit path.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.is_open.total
metrics.description: outcome: open / closed_hours / closed_status / paused_status. Feeds the map view usage dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.opening_hours.days_touched
metrics.description: How many day-keys were touched per opening_hours edit. Feeds the schedule-management analytics — long tail signals bulk edits (a whole-week rewrite vs an exception-day tweak).

metrics.name: stackra.branch.capacity_gate.total
metrics.description: outcome: permitted / refused_capacity. Fires from `CapacityGate::allowsAdditional()` — populated only when the tenant has `branch_capacity_gating` on.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.closure_notification.fanout_size
metrics.description: Number of recipients per BranchClosedNotification fanout. Fires from `NotifyStaffOfBranchClosureJob`. Long tail signals large chain-gym closures — the ops team pre-alerts these.

metrics.name: stackra.branch.slot_usage
metrics.description: Point-in-time `active_branches / branch_slot_cap` per tenant. Populated hourly. Feeds the entitlement-upgrade-nudge dashboard for tenants approaching the cap.
